title: Retenzy.pdf
summaries:
* Retenzy is an all-in-one customer retention and loyalty platform designed for growing Shopify e-commerce brands.
* The software was founded in 2023 and is headquartered in Pune, India.
* It combines rewards, referral structures, and product reviews to increase customer lifetime value (LTV).
* Loyalty program features include points-based economies, tier-based VIP tracks, and custom milestones.
* The platform automates text, photo, and video review collection, syncs with Google Shopping, and generates SEO-rich snippets.
* Businesses can create custom referral networks to turn existing customers into brand advocates.

* Integrates with Google Shopping and generates SEO-rich snippets.
* Allows businesses to create custom referral networks to turn customers into brand advocates.
* Supports membership tiers with exclusive perks like early access, free shipping, or special discounts.
* Provides built-in email marketing flows, including welcome emails, shipping updates, abandoned cart reminders, and post-purchase follow-ups.
* Features over 15 pre-built storefront widgets to display loyalty incentives and review sections without requiring custom development.
